headline: Micron surges 16%+ on blockbuster earnings
detail: Micron's blowout quarter signals strong demand in the chip cycle — memory, AI infrastructure, and data center spend all healthy. This directly benefits your AVGO and SMH exposure today, and could give AVGO a short-term bounce off its losses. Watch whether the move holds into the regular session or fades — a fade would be a red flag for the whole sector.

headline: JPMorgan warns retail margin pullback spells trouble for tech
detail: JPMorgan is explicitly flagging that retail traders cutting margin and options use is a headwind for high-multiple tech names — precisely your book. You're running margin on names already down 9-13%, so if this trend accelerates, forced selling from other retail players could pressure your positions further. This isn't abstract risk; it's describing your environment.

headline: Friday set to be one of the biggest volume days of the year
detail: Wall Street's version of roster-cut day hits Friday, likely meaning extreme intraday swings and potential stop-hunting in volatile names. Your stops on SPAL ($19), PLTR ($85), and AVGO ($336) could get tested in a high-volume flush. Know your exit prices now, not in the moment.

headline: Defense stocks slide on Europe rearmament doubts
detail: Not a direct holding for you, but broad risk-off from defense weakness can bleed into growth and tech sentiment. More relevant: it signals macro uncertainty that tends to hurt margin-heavy growth books like yours when it combines with other headwinds.
